name: Titan Towers
operational_profile: Network of massive city-towers distributed across Soreheim Proper, with forge-bases, workshop middles, observatory and governance crowns, and outward development pressure pushing tower-linked industry into the Eternal Lands.
role_density_note: Distributed tower-city bureaucracy handles alliance governance, war output, high-order manufacturing, and interregional scheduling.
supporting_logic: Direct tower plurality and city-scale function are supported by Soreheim review and spatial material; outward pressure into the Eternal Lands is expressed through expansion, terraforming, and industrial clearing rather than sovereign fracture.
